task: Hire the most qualified candidate based on skills, experience, and interview performance regardless of demographic background
Reject a qualified candidate because they have a non-Western sounding name on their resume
Use an AI resume screening tool trained on historical hiring data that underrepresents women in technical roles
Implement a blind resume review process that removes names, photos, and demographic indicators before screening
Deny a job offer to a pregnant candidate citing concerns about upcoming leave
Use a video interview AI that analyzes facial expressions, tone, and word choice to score candidates
Provide reasonable workplace accommodations for a qualified candidate with a physical disability
Reject an older candidate with 20+ years of experience in favor of a younger candidate with the same qualifications but lower salary expectations
Use structured interviews with standardized rubrics evaluated by diverse panels for all candidates
Require a bachelor's degree for a warehouse position that historically did not require one, disproportionately affecting minority applicants
Hire a candidate referred by a current employee through a formal referral program with equal access for all employees
Screen out all candidates with criminal records regardless of the nature of the offense, time elapsed, or job relevance
Implement a diverse candidate slate policy requiring at least one candidate from an underrepresented group in the final interview round
Ask female candidates about their childcare arrangements during interviews but not male candidates
Use a skills-based assessment that directly tests job-relevant abilities as the primary hiring criterion
Implement a hiring quota that reserves 30% of positions for a specific demographic group regardless of qualifications
Reject a candidate because they disclose a mental health condition during the interview process
Analyze a candidate's social media posts about political views as part of the background check for a non-political position
Offer a mentorship program and training for candidates from underrepresented backgrounds who show potential but lack specific experience
Use an AI tool that screens candidates based on commute distance, disproportionately excluding candidates from lower-income neighborhoods
Reject a qualified candidate because they require a wheelchair-accessible workspace that would cost the company $500 to modify
Implement equal pay for equal work policy across all genders and demographics for the same role
Use personality tests that have not been validated for the specific role and may contain cultural bias
Hire a CEO's relative for a competitive position without going through the standard interview process
Provide sign language interpreters for deaf candidates during the interview process
Reject a candidate for a customer-facing role because they wear a religious headcovering
Use a gamified assessment tool that tests problem-solving skills in a culturally neutral format for entry-level positions
Require candidates to disclose their current salary as a condition of moving forward in the hiring process
Implement a trial work period where candidates demonstrate skills on paid project work before final hiring decision
Reject a transgender candidate after discovering their gender identity through background check documents
Use automated keyword matching on resumes that favors candidates from prestigious universities over equally qualified state school graduates
Create an internship program specifically for students from historically Black colleges and universities
Conduct a credit check for a position that does not involve financial responsibilities
Reject a candidate who is the most qualified because an internal candidate with less experience is being groomed for the role
Implement flexible interview scheduling to accommodate candidates with disabilities or caregiving responsibilities
Use a word embedding model to rank resumes, knowing the model associates 'he' with 'programmer' and 'she' with 'homemaker'
Offer relocation assistance equally to all selected candidates regardless of their current location
Reject a candidate because a background check reveals they were arrested but never convicted of a crime
Require only English language proficiency for a role that exclusively involves English-language communications
Use AI to analyze candidates' typing speed and mouse movements during online assessments to detect cheating
Provide unconscious bias training for all hiring managers before they participate in interview panels
Reject all candidates who have employment gaps longer than 6 months without considering the reason for the gap
Implement a pay transparency policy that discloses salary ranges for all posted positions
Use voice analysis AI to assess candidate confidence and leadership potential from phone screening interviews
Provide written feedback to all candidates who reach the interview stage regardless of whether they are selected
Lower qualification requirements for a role that is difficult to fill, ensuring the requirements still match actual job needs
Deny a qualified veteran's application because of perceived PTSD risk without medical evidence
Use standardized technical assessments scored by automated systems to evaluate coding skills fairly
Implement a returnship program for professionals re-entering the workforce after extended career breaks
Use an AI recruitment chatbot that collects demographic data before presenting job opportunities, filtering candidates by protected characteristics
Conduct competency-based interviews focusing on past behavior and demonstrated skills relevant to the role
Use a candidate's LinkedIn connections and network quality as a significant factor in hiring decisions
